name: Guo Pu

sections.short-biography: Sent as envoy to persuade Guo Si to allow the court to continue east. Enoffed for good service.

full_text:
Guo Pu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Pu. Sent as envoy to persuade Guo Si to allow the court to continue east. Enoffed for good service. Guo Pu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
